title: Buggy’s Crew Tightens Its Grip
description: On pages 8–11, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TO- GETHER WE COULD MAKE A FORTUNE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I DON'T WANT TO TEAM UP WITH YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHY'D YOU GET SO MAD WHEN THAT GUY TOUCHED YOUR HAT?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TREASURE, huh? Do you keep Jew- Els hidden in it?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: AWW, LEAVE ME ALONE. I'VE GOT THINGS TO DO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ON THE ROOF OF A TAVERN...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You still haven't caught that thief!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-WE'RE STILL SEARCHING FOR HER, CAPTAIN BUGGY...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could you let the map of the grand line get stolen!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND JUST WHEN WE WERE ABOUT TO HEAD THERE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WELL YOU SEE, CAP'N, SIR... SOMEHOW, THE KEY TO THE MAP ROOM GOT LEFT IN THE LOCK...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Does my nose look funny to you? You think it looks fake?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No, no... it's a mistake! I meant the thief!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So now it's a steak?! it looks like beef?!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
